texto: Someone made me a Leaf Coneybear finger puppet. Someone made me a portrait of me on some chocolate. I'm keeping it. I daren't eat such a work of art. It's so unique and so fun that fans do that. It's incredibly flattering. I like it when people spend time on me. People don't spend the same amount of time on my brother who's an insurance broker.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Barrett Foa: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de limites e escolhas conscientes. O trecho “Someone made me a Leaf Coneybear finger puppet. Someone made me a portrait of me on some chocolat…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que trabalho, work, time pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de termino e trabalho.

frase_original: Someone made me a Leaf Coneybear finger puppet. Someone made me a portrait of me on some chocolate. I'm keeping it. I daren't eat such a work of art. It's so unique and so fun that fans do that. It's incredibly flattering. I like it when people spend time on me. People don't spend the same amount of time on my brother who's an insurance broker.
